mapper.select:
SELECT
H.homepage_code "loca",
SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '통합', 1, 0)) "all_member_cnt", SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '자관', 1, 0)) "a_member_cnt", SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '준회원', 1, 0)) "b_member_cnt", SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '탈퇴', 1, 0)) "c_member_cnt", SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '반입회원', 1, 0)) "d_member_cnt", SUM(DECODE(U.GUBUN, '전환회원', 1, 0)) "e_member_cnt", SUM(LOAN_CNT) "loan_cnt" FROM ( SELECT U.*, CASE WHEN U.GUBUN IN ('반입회원', '전환회원') THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GBELAS.TN_BC_USER_LOAN_STAT L WHERE L.SEQ_NO = U.SEQ_NO AND L.LOCA = U.LOCA AND loan_date >= REPLACE(#{start_date}, '-') AND loan_date <= REPLACE(#{end_date}, '-')) ELSE 0 END LOAN_CNT FROM( SELECT * FROM GBELAS.TN_ST_USER_STAT where work_date >= REPLACE(#{start_date}, '-') AND work_date <= REPLACE(#{end_date}, '-') UNION SELECT * FROM GBELAS.TN_ST_USER_BC_STAT WHERE work_date >= REPLACE(#{start_date}, '-') AND work_date <= REPLACE(#{end_date}, '-') ) U ) U, (SELECT homepage_code, print_seq, homepage_type, homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE homepage_type != 0) H WHERE U.loca(+) = H.homepage_code
GROUP BY U.LOCA, print_seq, homepage_code, homepage_type, homepage_name
ORDER BY print_seq, homepage_type, homepage_name
